THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLBRIGHT CLASSIC CARE CLEANING & LAUNDRY, INC.
